Package org.solenopsis.soap.tooling

Class FlowStart

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.FlowBaseElement
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.FlowElement
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.FlowNode
org.solenopsis.soap.tooling.FlowStart
public class FlowStart extends FlowNode

Java class for FlowStart complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="FlowStart">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}FlowNode">
       <sequence>
         <element name="connector" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}FlowConnector" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="doesRequireRecordChangedToMeetCriteria" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="filterFormula" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="filterLogic" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="filters" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}FlowRecordFilter" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="object" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="objectContainer" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="recordTriggerType" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}RecordTriggerType" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="schedule" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}FlowSchedule" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="scheduledPaths" type="{urn:metadata.tooling.soap.sforce.com}FlowScheduledPath" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="segment" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="triggerType" type="{urn:tooling.soap.sforce.com}FlowTriggerType" minOccurs="0"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

    • getFilters

      public List<FlowRecordFilter> getFilters()
      Gets the value of the filters property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the filters property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getFilters().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list FlowRecordFilter

      Returns:
      The value of the filters property.

    • getScheduledPaths

      public List<FlowScheduledPath> getScheduledPaths()
      Gets the value of the scheduledPaths property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the scheduledPaths property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getScheduledPaths().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list FlowScheduledPath

      Returns:
      The value of the scheduledPaths property.
